items.summary: Microsoft is using the fact that Halo: Campaign Evolved will offer a physical game disc in its box as a selling point.

items.title: GTA 6 Would Probably Run on the Steam Machine
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 isn't coming out on PC right away, but when it inevitably does, it should run on the Steam Machine, albeit at lower settings.

items.title: One Chart Shows Just How Unaffordable Playing The Next GTA Has Become
items.summary: Even if you factor in inflation, buying GTA 6 and a new PS5 is the most pricey way to play in the franchise's history

items.title: Rockstar UK employees say the GTA 6 developer's still plagued by gender pay gaps, crunch, and vague bonuses which make them 'as pliable as possible to their boss's whims'

items.title: Surprising no one, GTA 6 is at the top of the PlayStation Store in practically every country in the world
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 is topping the PlayStation Store charts across nearly every regional version of Sony's digital store. Since pre-orders went live on 25th June , the game has shot to the top of the various PS Stores worldwide. Read more

items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 has finally locked its 19th November release date and pre-orders are now open. items.title: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
items.summary: Microsoft has refuted claims that its rival system, the PlayStation 5, is outselling the Xbox edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 , claiming that the figure "doesn't represent pre-order data" and insisting "we've had record orders". Read more

items.title: GTA 6 has no plans for a post-launch physical release, "not at launch, and not months later", insists new report
items.summary: A new report has cast doubt on hopes that a physical version of Grand Theft Auto 6 will follow the digital release later this year. Read more

items.title: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 apparently features a new in-game social network where we'll be able to watch videos and follow influences to discover "secret" side missions, which makes it sound like Rockstar is aiming its satirical cannon at TikTok and Instagram this time around. Read more

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 demand may be so high it will "likely outstrip supply" this holiday season, a video game retailer warns
items.summary: Major retailers may not have the stock of consoles necessary to bear the incoming wave of demand this holiday season, thanks to Grand Theft Auto 6 's release, it's claimed. Read more

items.title: Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc in the box, Insomniac assures players as GTA 6's download code approach sends ripples around the industry
items.summary: Insomniac Games has assured fans not to worry: unlike the impending GTA 6 , the physical edition of Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc when it releases exclusively on PlayStation 5 on 15th September. Read more

items.title: A proper physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 will arrive before the year's end, insider claims
items.summary: The same insider who claimed in February that Grand Theft Auto 6 wouldn't launch with a physical version - which turned out to be almost correct - has now claimed a proper physical edition with a disc will launch in December. Read more

items.title: Online retailers are stating that PS5 GTA 6 codes can only be played in the country they're bought
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders have officially gone live in many parts of the world, and while many players will be placing their pre-orders through the PlayStation and Xbox Stores, many others will order from Amazon and online retailers. Read more

items.title: Sony wants you to know GTA 6 "will play best on PS5", and here's why
items.summary: Sony has released a blog post detailing the PlayStation 5 features that will work with Grand Theft Auto 6 , and it's claimed the game will "play best" on PS5. Read more
